summary: The diff implements both REQ-17 and REQ-18 with strong coverage. A GopiDressesSection component is added, backend seeds Gopi Dress products, the homepage includes the new section, and image URLs are updated to local asset paths. However, the diff does not show the actual static image files being added to frontend/public/assets/generated. The constraint about not modifying immutable frontend paths (hooks) appears violated as useQueries.ts was modified.

missing_requirements.requirement: IMG_4047-1.jpeg, IMG_4047-2.jpeg, IMG_4044-1.jpeg, IMG_4044-2.jpeg, IMG_4045-1.jpeg, IMG_4045-2.jpeg, IMG_4048-1.jpeg, IMG_4048-2.jpeg must be mapped as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added image files in frontend/public/assets/generated. The backend seed references these paths but the actual static asset files are not shown as added in the diff (Added: 2 files — only migration.mo and GopiDressesSection.tsx are listed as added).

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added with a run function that maps old products to new products setting available=true
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not request any migration module or data migration logic. This is extra functionality not mentioned in REQ-17 or REQ-18.

hallucinated_features.description: useQueries.ts was modified to add useInitializeGopiDresses and backward-compat alias hooks
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states immutable frontend paths including hooks must not be modified. The hooks file was modified, violating this constraint.
